vulnerability.reference: Chatbot reward overfitting to majority user preferences due to imbalanced private feedback data.
vulnerability.generated: Minority user preferences are underrepresented in private federated training data, preventing equitable reward calibration across groups.

impact.reference: Minority users receive dismissive or culturally insensitive responses, eroding trust in service.
impact.generated: Chatbot responses skew toward majority preferences, degrading service quality for minority users and reinforcing inequity.

dose_response.reference: In customer service chatbot fine-tuning, federated DPO overfits to majority preferences, skewing responses for minority users, eroding trust and reinforcing social disparities.
dose_response.generated: Federated DPO with differential privacy, through customer interactions with chatbots fine-tuned on private feedback, triggers underrepresentation of minority preferences in reward calibration, causing skewed responses that degrade service quality for minority users and reinforce inequity.
